title: Provider
description: Declares a technology (spec.type) and where it runs (spec.runtime). The provider implementation selected by spec.type defines the shape of spec.configuration.

type.description: Provider implementation to construct. Shipped in v1.0.0: redpanda, postgres, debezium, s3, minio, s3sink (plus noop/container for testing). Open-ended: unknown types fail at registry construction, not schema validation.

runtime.description: Where the provider's backing objects run. Fields beyond type are runtime-specific (e.g. network for docker).

type.description: docker and fake (testing) are implemented; kubernetes/external/terraform are accepted for forward compatibility and rejected at registry construction as planned-but-unavailable.

network.description: docker-specific: the shared network name (default: datascape).

configuration.description: Provider-specific configuration, keyed by spec.type (e.g. image, ports, *SecretRef names). Never contains secret values.

secretRefs.description: Names of SecretReference resources resolved by the engine and passed to the provider.

external.description: External lifecycle: Datascape never creates or deletes the backing system.
